title: Garden Mile Heavy Duty Carbon Steel Digging Fork - Gardening Hand Tool, Garden Fork with Plastic Coated Handle for Digging Over and Breaking Soil - 38 Inches Long Digging Fork
features: ?????????????? ???????? ???????????? ????????: This digging fork is a useful garden tool. This strong fork is ideal for digging over and breaking up compacted soil. A perfect tool for cultivating all types of soil and for the preparation of flower beds before planting seeds.

????????-?????????????? ????????????????: This garden hand fork comes with a carbon steel shaft and a plastic (PVC) grip that make this fork strong and robust. The ergonomic handle is easy to grip and won't be slipped easily. The durable blade provides comfortable digging and cultivating experience.

?????????????????? ?????? ????????????????????: This garden fork is finished with powder-coated which makes this fork waterproof and rust-resistant; won't be deformed easily and provides long-lasting durability.

?????????????? ???????? The size of this garden digger is 38 inches long, approx 7 inches across the head. This is the perfect size to do cultivation fluently. This gardening fork is a professional quality tool and made for a lifetime of use!

???????? ??????????????????????: These garden forks are more efficient to complete a variety of gardening tasks. This digging fork is perfect for loosening the soil, moving mulch, leaves, straw, hay, garden debris, turning over compost etc.
